name: any-agent
description: A collection of Claude Code skills including Agent SDK guides and session knowledge harvesting tools.

plugins.name: agent-sdk-guide
plugins.description: Skills for understanding and building with @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk — covers query(), custom tools, sessions, permissions, hooks, and advanced patterns.

plugins.name: session-harvest
plugins.description: Capture and convert knowledge learned during a Claude Code session into reusable skills. Reviews conversation history, extracts valuable workflows and patterns, and invokes skill-creator to generate formal skills.
